# CWE-909: Missing Initialization of Resource
lang: go
file: CWE-909-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var appDB *gorm.DB

type Widget struct {
	ID   uint
	Name string
}

// Vulnerable: global database handle is used before startup initialization.
func ListWidgets(c *gin.Context) {
	var widgets []Widget
	appDB.Find(&widgets)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, widgets)
}
